footer.tagline: Building community power in East Portland

hero.title: Gateway Confluence
hero.subtitle: Where Community Roots Run Deep
hero.description: A transit-centered, culturally plural, economically stable community platform for East Portland — where longtime residents can remain, small businesses can thrive, and public space fosters belonging.

sections.visionText: We envision a community where infrastructure serves daily life rather than speculative growth. A staying community, not a replacement community.
sections.planText: Seven strategic pillars guide our work — from housing security to shared infrastructure. Each one grounded in the lived experience of Gateway residents.
sections.communityText: Gateway Confluence is built by and for the people who live here. Your voice, your language, your vision matters.

about.title: About Gateway Confluence
about.subtitle: Building community power in East Portland's Gateway district
about.missionText: Gateway Confluence is a community-driven initiative to build a transit-centered, culturally plural, economically stable East Portland — where longtime residents can remain, small businesses can thrive without displacement, public space fosters belonging, and infrastructure serves daily life rather than speculative growth.
about.antiDisplacementText: Development must not displace existing residents or businesses. Every project strengthens the community that already exists.
about.culturalPluralityText: Gateway's multilingual, multicultural character is our greatest strength. We amplify it, not manage it.
about.communityGovernanceText: Residents make decisions about their own neighborhood. Not advisory. Real power.
about.infrastructureDignityText: Childcare, food access, cooling centers, and workforce training are rights, not amenities.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.messagePlaceholder: How can we help? Share your ideas, questions, or concerns...
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.officeHoursText: Community meetings are held monthly. Check the Events page for dates and locations.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.subtitle: Gateway Confluence is built by the people who live here
getInvolved.volunteerText: Join a working group aligned with one of our seven strategic pillars. We need organizers, translators, researchers, and community connectors.
getInvolved.attendText: Our monthly community meetings are open to everyone. Interpretation is available in Spanish, Vietnamese, Chinese, and Russian. Childcare provided.
getInvolved.shareText: Your experience shapes this plan. Whether you've lived in Gateway for decades or just moved in, your perspective matters.
getInvolved.spreadText: Tell your neighbors about Gateway Confluence. Share our website. Invite someone to a meeting. Community power grows one conversation at a time.
getInvolved.ctaText: Ready to make a difference in Gateway?
